title: Overview
excerpt: Model your business on Stripe with products and prices. [How products and prices work](https://docs.stripe.com/products-prices/how-products-and-prices-work.md): Learn what products and prices are and how to use them in Stripe. [Manage products and prices](https://docs.stripe.com/products-prices/manage-prices.md): Create, edit, archive, and delete products and prices. [Flat rate (good-better-best)](https://docs.stripe.com/products-prices/pricing-models.md#flat-rate): Offer your customers a choice of escalating options, like basic, starter, and Enterprise service levels [Per-seat](https://docs.stripe.com/products-prices/pricing-models.md#per-seat): Let your customers pick how many seats or licenses they’ll use and bill them for each.…
